## Install

1. Download the `.zip` below, unzip, drag `QuickPad.app` to `/Applications`.
2. macOS will block the first launch — this is the standard Gatekeeper
   warning for apps without a paid Apple Developer Program signature.
   Workaround: right-click `QuickPad.app` → **Open** → **Open**, or run once
   in Terminal:
   ```sh
   xattr -cr /Applications/QuickPad.app
   ```

Requires macOS 14 or later. Universal binary (Apple Silicon + Intel).

---
